title: MWOOT White Artificial Rose Flower Heads, 144Pcs Small Fake Rose for DIY Wedding Accessories Make Bridal Hair Clips Headbands Dress, 2.5CM Faux Flower Heads for Crafts
features: Packages Includes: a total of 144 mini artificial flower heads for crafts DIY.
Mini Fake Rose Flower: rose head diameter is about 2.5CM, Great for embellishing clips, headbands, hats, weddings craft projects.
Material: PE flower with wire stem, The bottom of the flower add the gauze.
Reusable Foam Flower: The reusable artificial flower decoration heads give the appearance of realistic roses without worry and hassle of maintenance;
Crafts Art Accessories: Use these deep real touch rose flower heads in bulk to create custom centerpieces, Halloween costumes, bouquets, flower arrangements.
description: About MWOOT Small Rose Flower Heads Set: Specifications: Material: PE Rose Head Quantity: 144 pieces in total. Size: approx. 1.5X2.5XM Feature: Great for embellishing clips, headbands, hats, weddings craft projects. Crafts flower head with wire stem, The bottom of the flower add the gauze.
